subject: [PATCH v5 32/36] mm/khugepaged: base private node collapse eligiblity on actor/cap bits

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch modifies the khugepaged daemon's behavior to base its decision on collapsing private nodes on the actor/capability bits. Specifically, it ensures that khugepaged does not silently collapse private node folios and allows MADV_COLLAPSE operations on private nodes opted into CAP_USER_NUMA. The changes are implemented through modifications to the folio_allows_collapse() function in mm/internal.h and its usage in mm/khugepaged.c.
